title: Reis dolls
wikitext:
[]: Rei's dolls             Quote Post by Barinax » Wed Jul 09, 2008 5:05 pm What's this I hear about Rei having dolls in her room?

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Wed Jul 09, 2008 6:19 pm I don't know. What did you hear?

[]:             Quote Post by TheAyanamiOtaku » Wed Jul 09, 2008 8:30 pm Rei has dolls in her room? How ironic...

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelion__x » Wed Jul 09, 2008 9:37 pm Aww! Lol.

[]:             Quote Post by Sharaz Destler » Thu Jul 10, 2008 9:08 am Must be thinking about this Evangelion @ School thing, or whatever it's called. In that, Chibi-Rei carries around a plush doll that looks remarkably similar to Sachiel (well, who wouldn't?).

[]:             Quote Post by Zuggy » Thu Jul 10, 2008 9:17 am Barinax wrote: What's this I hear about Rei having dolls in her room?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Jul 10, 2008 11:41 am Let me guess: It was something from the Death/Rebirth or EoE commentary? Anyway, the little Rei (Rei 1) in Petite Eva @ School does carry around these dolls/stuffed animals of the Angels, yeah. It's possible you're thinking of that.

[]:             Quote Post by Barinax » Thu Jul 10, 2008 5:24 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Let me guess: It was something from the Death/Rebirth or EoE commentary?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Jul 10, 2008 9:50 pm The Director's Cuts are treated as default canon around here. Not certain what it has to do with the discussion except how they show those dolls (and Asuka's trauma of sorts as a result around them) in 22'.

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Thu Jul 10, 2008 9:55 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: The Director's Cuts are treated as default canon around here.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Jul 10, 2008 9:58 pm Hal: http://evageeks.org/FGP/What_Is_Canon%3F http://evageeks.org/FGP/Episode_24%27_Analysis

[]:             Quote Post by Barinax » Thu Jul 10, 2008 10:29 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: The Director's Cuts are treated as default canon around here. Not certain what it has to do with the discussion except how they show those dolls (and Asuka's trauma of sorts as a result around them) in 22'.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Jul 11, 2008 11:05 am They are no dolls in Rei's room: only lots of books, bandages covered in blood, that water beaker and her medicine. Or the monkey one and the hanging one?

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Jul 11, 2008 2:27 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Shinji being in Rei's apartment was episode 05.

[]:             Quote Post by chazthesilencer » Sat Jul 12, 2008 3:57 pm Mr. Tines wrote: Also episode 17.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Jul 12, 2008 4:05 pm chazthesilencer wrote: I somehow doubt Rei having ANY dolls, ever.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Jul 13, 2008 5:40 pm Mr. Tines wrote: Don't you remember the flashback scene where she and Sarai are struggling over a doll?
